projects.title: Intuit
description: D library for language and embedding model endpoints that replaces fragile JSON shims with strongly typed native structures, covering OpenAI-compatible APIs and Claude.
Chat completions with streaming, batch embeddings, tool usage, and persistent per-model configuration for production inference workflows.
SIMD-optimized vector math using AVX intrinsics and compile-time metaprogramming for zero-overhead type-safe serialization.

projects.title: Akashi
description: Chemistry-aware data retrieval library in D that unifies PubChem, Wikipedia, Psychonaut Wiki, PubMed, and PMC into a single queryable interface.
Lazy content fetching with structured text parsing from wikitext and XML into compact ASTs for rendering and extraction.
Cross-source resolution between scientific databases, similarity search on compound identifiers, and reusable HTTP rate-limiting primitives for building new adapters.

projects.title: Chemica
description: GTK-based desktop application for exploring chemical compounds with interactive 3D molecular visualization, property tracking, and standard identifier lookup.
Automated dosage aggregation and similarity matching using structural scoring to identify analogous compounds and fill knowledge gaps.
Multi-source data pipelines from scientific and knowledge databases, with a local AI synthesis layer that resolves and merges overlapping content into unified entries.

projects.title: Multidasm
projects.description: Dynamic assembler with deep compile-time integration for the D language.

projects.title: Webull-SDK
projects.description: Finance SDK in D with strongly typed market data and multi-market account access across equities, options, crypto, and futures. HMAC-SHA1 request signing, MFA token flows, and automatic session refresh for autonomous authentication.

projects.title: Jitsort
projects.description: Just-in-time sorting algorithm that generates specialized machine code to achieve constant-time performance.

projects.title: AutoHandshake!
description: Ruby and JavaScript workflow automation suite for Handshake AI that replaces repetitive manual annotation and triage work with scripted, auditable runs for contractor teams at scale.
Selenium-based browser automation with injected monitoring hooks, multi-tab coordination, and automatic recovery from UI stalls for reliable long-running sessions.
HTML parsing and context-aware quality-of-life tooling that gives workers fine-grained control while maintaining full auditability.

projects.title: LinkedIn
projects.description: Ruby CLI and library for scraping and aggregating LinkedIn Learning course and path data using Selenium and Nokogiri.

projects.title: Nimbus
projects.description: Lightweight Linux CLI for unified display configuration controlling brightness, contrast, gamma, color temperature, and monitor-specific VCP features. Human-friendly command labels alongside raw hardware codes with auto-detection and intelligent backlight preference.

projects.title: Mobster
projects.description: BitTorrent protocol implementation in D with Python streaming support for terminal-based media playback with cover art and quality selection.

projects.title: Intel Intrinsics
projects.description: AVX-512 support and additional intrinsics for the D language SIMD library, with changes merged upstream.

projects.title: Cassowary
projects.description: Managed C# library for deep runtime introspection, exposing CoreCLR internals as first-class types for reflection, allocation, and layout inspection without native code. No longer actively maintained; succeeded by Godwit.

projects.title: Godwit
projects.description: Comprehensive D library for reverse analysis and exposure of CoreCLR internals, serving as the successor to Cassowary with complete runtime structure modeling.

projects.title: Tern
projects.description: High-performance standard library extension for D with compile-time tooling and object manipulation primitives. Under active maintenance with a focused rewrite in progress.

projects.title: Pipit
projects.description: High-performance terminal text editor using AVX2 and AVX-512 SIMD instructions for speed-critical text operations under tight resource constraints.

projects.title: Depcat
projects.description: Terraria mod using TModLoader that enables dynamic dependency injection of unmanaged code at runtime.

projects.title: Swaypaper
projects.description: Minimal wrapper for the SWWW wallpaper daemon enabling slideshow backgrounds from multiple source directories.

projects.title: Challenge 02
projects.description: Challenge library for high-entropy encryption algorithms optimized with SIMD vectorization for maximum throughput.

projects.title: GarbageCorruptor
projects.description: Low-level CoreCLR research exploring unsafe string copying, dynamic array allocation and resizing, and garbage collection blocking mechanisms.

projects.title: UndeadInterop
projects.description: C# syscall library using shellcode injection and export table walking to dynamically resolve, execute, and detect hooks on system calls.

projects.title: Rio
projects.description: Assembly-like dynamic scripting language for C# targeting virtual code obfuscation and macro system integration.

projects.title: MihoyoEXP
projects.description: Security research on CVE-2020-36603, a kernel driver vulnerability in Mihoyo's anti-cheat system, producing an academic reference for vulnerable driver communication patterns. Patched as of 2023.

projects.title: VEXAPI
projects.description: Reverse analysis and documentation for VEX Robotics internal firmware and control APIs.

projects.title: Mutagen
projects.description: Audio format support for FLAC, MP4, and MP3 with full catalog parsing for tracks, albums, and artists.

projects.title: Git-Around
projects.description: Configurable Python utility for Git housekeeping and maintenance of local repositories and modules.

projects.title: Sim-D
projects.description: SIMD vector library in D using static arrays to achieve near-native performance.

projects.title: Insurgent
description: Full-stack companion client for a real-time strategy game using Selenium Chrome integration, featuring authentication, live dashboards, and WebSocket data feeds.
Quick-lookup dashboard for unit stacks and a full catalog with in-depth data on units, research, and buildings for competitive gameplay.
Live match tracking with minimal overhead using WebSocket connections to collect real-time data on all visible nations and map positions.
Developed under the purview of Twin Harbor.

projects.title: Nosferatu
projects.description: Efficient object-oriented HTML and JavaScript parser with a GDI-based rendering engine.

projects.title: SMBIOSReader
projects.description: Full-featured SMBIOS system information reader and DSP interpreter with an interactive data interface.

projects.title: Google-SDK
description: D library for Google Drive integration with OAuth authentication, full file system operations, and metadata management.
Unified file interface covering login, identity, folder and file listing, upload, download, save, delete, and text extraction.
Focused modules for Google Docs and Sheets MIME detection and lightweight plain-text or CSV export, built on a reusable OAuth and HTTP foundation.

projects.title: Conductor
description: HTTP, OAuth, and network orchestration utilities in D that eliminate boilerplate when connecting applications to external services.
Typed request building, automatic token refresh, JSON and form serialization, connection pooling, and resilience patterns including retry and circuit breaking.
Powers the transport layer for four production libraries including Intuit, Akashi, Google-SDK, and Warbler.

projects.title: Warbler
projects.description: D CLI backend for academic institutions with a git-inspired command structure for grading, rubric generation, and classroom organization. Institutional plugin model mapping domain commands to arbitrary LMS backends with per-school configuration and OAuth authentication.

projects.title: Selenium-SDK
projects.description: Modern Selenium SDK for D with a clean, strongly typed interface for browser automation, element queries, and session management.

projects.title: Cilk
projects.description: Common Intermediate Language disassembler and assembler for D with compile-time integration and minimal-allocation parsing.

projects.title: Head
projects.description: PE and ELF binary format support in D for parsing executables, object files, and core dumps into structured types for analysis.

projects.title: Regex
projects.description: Alternative regex matching engines and compile-time pattern compilation in D for zero-runtime-overhead text scanning.

projects.title: Soundcore A3954 Dump
projects.description: Reverse-engineered BLE state packets for the Soundcore Liberty 4 Pro and decoded raw protocol captures into structured definitions. Archived; served as the foundational reference for the OpenSCQ30 cross-platform tool.

projects.title: OpenSCQ30
projects.description: Cross-platform application for controlling Soundcore audio device settings across desktop and Android. Liberty 4 Pro configuration protocol, exposing EQ profiles, ANC modes, and firmware metadata through a unified interface.
